title: Public Safety HQ Parking Lease at 220 South Gettis and Multi-Layered Parking Strategy
summary: Item 23 (Mosaic/UKG) held again. Item 25: Lease of 100 parking spaces at 220 South Gettis for public safety headquarters at $37.50/month/space. Commissioner of Assessment presents multi-layered parking strategy: short-term Gettis lease (asphalt ready), mid-term train track lot (needs clearing, grading, paving — not feasible until spring). Council questions lot capacity and notes train track site appears limited. Per-space pricing ensures city pays only for usable spaces.
